reviews.comment:
Falta asfaltar. Solamente tiene enripiada la calle de acceso.
Lo bueno: tiene wi-fi libre porque escasea la señal de datos de las cías telefónicas.

(Translated by Google)
The road needs paving. Only the access road is gravel.
The good thing: it has free Wi-Fi because mobile data coverage is weak.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Marcelo! Muchas gracias por tu opinión! Prometemos trabajar para mejorar 💪

reviews.comment:
Paramos para hacer una parada, baños incómodos 1 solo, no había cambiador para bebes y un poco deteriorados.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped for a break; the bathrooms were uncomfortable (only one), there was no baby changing table, and they were a bit run down.

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio, tuvimos un inconveniente con el auto y chico de la estación nos ayudó en todo y con la mejor onda!! Les recomiendo que pasen por ahí. Gracias Emiliano!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. We had a problem with our car, and the guy at the station helped us out with everything and was very friendly! I recommend you stop by. Thanks, Emiliano!
